page: OVHcloud b3-512 is a General Purpose server powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 128 dedicated physical cores on an AMD EPYC Milan processor running at 2.3 GHz, with one thread per core and no hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 512 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. Local storage consists of a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the network interface delivers a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the b3-512 demonstrates top-tier multi-core performance, scoring in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU tests. Its memory subsystem achieves a top-tier cached read bandwidth of 10324.12 GB/sec and strong uncached read/write speeds. Multi-threaded operations, such as bzip3 decompression and software compilation with Clang, also rank in the top 10%. However, single-threaded tasks like gzip compression and bzip3 decompression fall into the average tier.

This server is highly effective for parallelized workloads, database operations, and multi-threaded processing. Redis SET operations perform exceptionally well, reaching 169.74 million operations per second. While prompt processing for large language models is strong, text generation speeds for larger models, such as the 70B model, are poor, indicating a tradeoff when running massive generative AI workloads without GPU acceleration. The dedicated core allocation and high resource density offer strong qualitative cost efficiency for compute-heavy, non-GPU tasks.
description: OVHcloud b3-512 is a General Purpose server configured with 128 dedicated physical AMD EPYC Milan cores running at 2.3 GHz, 512 GB of RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD. Operating on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 architecture, it provides a 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The server delivers top-tier multi-core performance, ranking in the top 10% for multi-threaded benchmarks, software compilation, and Redis SET operations. However, single-threaded performance and large-model LLM text generation represent notable tradeoffs. This hardware profile is highly suited for multi-threaded applications, database operations, and static web serving, offering excellent qualitative cost efficiency for dense, CPU-bound workloads that do not require GPU acceleration.
og_description: OVHcloud b3-512 is a General Purpose server featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 512 GB RAM, and 400 GB NVMe storage, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for demanding enterprise workloads.
meta_description: OVHcloud b3-512 is a General Purpose server with 128 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 512 GB RAM, and 400 GB NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A high-density, dedicated 128-core server optimized for multi-threaded workloads, database operations, and high-throughput data processing.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores with no hyperthreading
512 GB RAM and 400 GB local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with one public IPv4 address
Best suited for multi-threaded processing, databases, and static web serving
